name: rich-card-in-flow
title: Rich Card in Flow
author: ilinxa
description: Read-only RichCardViewer renderer for flow-canvas-01 nodes + consumer-owned-dialog pattern for editing rich-card content inside canvas nodes. Canonical implementation of the popup-edit renderer convention from flow-canvas-01@v0.2.0 perf description Q33. Cross-registry deps on @ilinxa/rich-card (editor) and @ilinxa/flow-canvas-01@^0.2.1 (host).
